title: non-record: int6 3xMLP + cosine warmdown (1.1704 bpb)
body:
wider MLP (3x) enabled by int6 quantization, cosine warmdown schedule, ortho init.
built on top of the merged SOTA. single seed, 8xH100 SXM.

- val_bpb: 1.1704
- artifact: 13.5MB
- steps: 7630
- training: 10min wallclock cap

only one seed so putting in non-record track. happy to run more seeds if needed.
